posts.title: Counter-Strike Made Me a Better Leader
posts.excerpt: 5000 hours. 7th in Australia. Printouts of maps on my desk. I didn't know I was becoming a leader. I thought I was just playing a game.

posts.title: The 486
posts.excerpt: I was seven. There was a beige box in the house. It had a Lion King demo on it. That was the beginning of everything.
